acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check validates runs[] id values as lowercase UUID-shaped strings.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_roadmap_run_content checks run ids with a lowercase UUID-shaped regex; negative-smoke-malformed-id.log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check validates started_at and finished_at timestamp/nullability shape.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The timestamp check accepts null finished_at and rejects malformed timestamp strings; negative-smoke-bad-timestamp.log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects non-string optional command, provider, external_id, url, rationale, superseded_by, audit_kind, worktree_path, agent, summary, and log_path fields when present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The optional metadata type check covers the listed string fields; negative-smoke-non-string-optional-metadata.log records an object-valued provider rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects malformed optional git_sha and non-integer optional exit_code values.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The git_sha and exit_code checks reject malformed values; negative-smoke-bad-git-sha.log and negative-smoke-bad-exit-code.log record expected failures.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects absolute, traversal, or missing optional log_path values when present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The log_path check mirrors report_path safety and existence behavior; absolute, traversal, and missing path smoke logs record expected failures.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-content-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records qd report validation passing with the stricter checker.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and focused negative smokes for malformed roadmap runs.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The evidence directory contains the requested positive logs and focused negative smoke logs.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The completion report marks realWorldValidation not_required and limits the node to repository qd run ledger validation.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd run ledger validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
